confidence_notes: All skills extracted from concrete work experience at Stripe, Plaid, and LinkedIn. Each skill is corroborated by specific project/job responsibilities with measurable outcomes. Self-reported skills section validated against job descriptions.

projects.name: Distributed Rate-Limiting System (Stripe)
projects.summary: Designed and implemented distributed rate-limiting system handling 120,000 RPS in production for Billing API microservices processing $4B+ in annual transactions.

projects.name: Bank Connection Ingestion Pipeline (Plaid)
projects.summary: Built production ETL pipeline processing 2M+ daily bank connections using Celery and RabbitMQ message queue architecture.

projects.name: PostgreSQL Migration (Plaid)
projects.summary: Executed zero-downtime migration of 8 services from PostgreSQL 11 to 14 using logical replication in production environment.

projects.name: OAuth Token Encryption (Plaid)
projects.summary: Implemented end-to-end encryption for OAuth token storage using AES-256 cryptography in production system.

projects.name: LinkedIn Learning Recommendation Engine (LinkedIn)
projects.summary: Built backend features for recommendation engine with A/B testing instrumentation running experiments on 500,000 daily active users.

impact_highlights.description: Designed distributed rate-limiting system for Stripe Billing API handling massive transaction volume
Optimized Stripe Billing API latency through profiling and Go hot path rewrites
impact_highlights.metric: P99 latency reduced from 380ms to 95ms (75% improvement)

impact_highlights.description: Built production ETL pipeline at Plaid for bank connection ingestion
Maintained core transaction aggregation service at Plaid with industry-leading reliability
A/B testing instrumentation for LinkedIn Learning recommendation engine
